name: io.github.ReplenishRadar/MCP
title: ReplenishRadar
description: Shopify + Amazon inventory planning, forecasting & replenishment over MCP (49 tools).

environmentVariables.name: REPLENISHRADAR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ReplenishRadar API key with the rr_sk_ prefix.

environmentVariables.name: REPLENISHRADAR_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional API base URL. Defaults to https://api.replenishradar.com.
